testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from our beloved students
testimonials.t1: My child learned to read Quran in just 4 months. Amazing teachers and very professional approach!
testimonials.t2: The flexible schedule fits perfectly with my work routine. Highly recommended for working professionals!
testimonials.t3: Best online Quran academy. My entire family is enrolled and the kids love their teachers!
